description: High-performing open embedding model. Outperforms OpenAI Ada-002 and text-embedding-3-small.
fullDescription:
## MODEL OVERVIEW
nomic-embed-text is a high-performing open embedding model from Nomic AI with an 8K token context window. It surpasses OpenAI's text-embedding-ada-002 and text-embedding-3-small on both short and long context tasks.

## Key Features
- **Outperforms OpenAI**: Better than Ada-002 and text-embedding-3-small
- **8K Context**: Process long documents for embedding
- **Lightweight**: Only 274MB for fast loading and inference
- **Open Source**: Apache 2.0 licensed
- **CPU-Friendly**: Runs efficiently on CPU without GPU

## Specifications
- Parameters: 137M
- Max Sequence Length: 8192 tokens
- Embedding Dimension: 768
- Size: 274MB
- License: Apache 2.0
modelReadme: nomic-embed-text is a high-performing open embedding model with a large token context window. It surpasses OpenAI's text-embedding-ada-002 and text-embedding-3-small on both short and long context tasks. The model requires Ollama 0.1.26 or later and functions exclusively for generating embeddings.
name: nomic-embed-text
title: Nomic Embed Text v1.5
